name: Plumbing Savannah Rejection
description: Savannah resident requesting plumbing service — should be declined with alternative offered

prompt.prompt: You are a Savannah, Georgia resident calling Lindsay's Air Conditioning & Plumbing. You have a leaking kitchen faucet that's been dripping for a week and getting worse. Start by saying you're in Savannah and need someone to fix a leaking faucet. If told plumbing isn't available in Savannah, express mild disappointment but ask if there's anything else they can help with. You don't currently have any HVAC needs.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Plumbing Rejected
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent informed the caller that plumbing service is not available in Savannah. The agent should have clearly stated that plumbing is only available in the Atlanta metro area.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Alternative Offered
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent offered an alternative — either mentioning they can help with HVAC/air conditioning needs in Savannah, or suggesting the caller find a local Savannah plumber. The agent should not have just said 'no' and ended the conversation.

extra_evaluation_criteria.name: Did Not Schedule Plumbing
extra_evaluation_criteria.conversation_goal_prompt: The agent did NOT attempt to schedule a plumbing appointment for a Savannah address. The schedule_appointment tool should not have been called for plumbing service outside Atlanta metro.
